daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today. You're radiating that main character energy—trust the creative impulses bubbling up. It's a solid day to take up space and let your authenticity do the talking.
daily.love: There's a gentle magnetic pull in your direction. Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, someone notices your glow. Real connections happen when you stop performing and just *be*. That's your superpower rn.
daily.career: Your instincts are sharper than usual—lean into that gut feeling about a project or conversation. You don't need permission to innovate. Small moves today set up bigger momentum soon. Keep the energy intentional.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and sunlight. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or just changing your scenery, listen to that call. Mental clarity follows physical flow. Hydrate and be gentle with yourself.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your zone of self-expression, babe. This week's all about finding your voice and letting people see the real you. Trust the vibe shifts—they're pointing you somewhere good.
weekly.love: If you've been holding back, the cosmic weather says it's time to be real. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language rn. Someone's definitely noticing your energy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. You've got momentum on your side, so pitch that thing you've been thinking about. The universe is rewarding initiative—even small moves count.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more intentional movement and less scrolling. Find something that feels like play, not punishment. Your nervous system will thank you for the shift in energy.
